meta.name: Auvvo AI SaaS Design System
meta.personality: Clean, modern, trustworthy, tech-forward but warm and accessible
meta.aesthetic_direction: Inspired by Web3 design trends. White frosted glass panels floating over soft blurred background. Subtle teal-lavender gradients for primary actions. Muted neutral text for readability.

background.note: Soft neutral grays. Landing page slightly lighter than dashboard.

surface.note: White translucent cards with glassmorphism effect.

accent.note: Teal mint as primary, soft lavender as secondary, gold for highlights.

text.note: Near-black for headings, gray scale for body text.

border.note: White borders on cards, subtle separators with low opacity black.

font_families.note: Inter for all text — excellent readability across sizes.

layout.app_shell: CSS Grid: 280px sidebar (fixed), 1fr main content area

design_principles: LIGHT & CLEAN: The UI is fundamentally light mode with white glassmorphism panels. Clean, airy, modern.
GLASS SURFACES: Cards and panels are translucent white with subtle borders. Shadows create depth without being heavy.
TEAL-LAVENDER ACCENTS: Primary actions use the teal-to-lavender gradient. Semantic colors (green/red/yellow) for status.
INTER TYPOGRAPHY: Inter for all text — geometric, highly legible, modern.
WIZARD FOCUS: When creating an agent, the form takes center stage with a narrow focused layout.
